predicate_mappings.change_executed: a change has been executed for {}
predicate_mappings.variant_window_assigned: a variant window has been assigned to {} in {}
predicate_mappings.window_allocated_for_case: a window has been allocated for {} in {}
predicate_mappings.responder_assignment_possible: the responder assignment for incident case {} is possible with on-call responder {}
predicate_mappings.change_plan_affinity: the change plan {} affects the affinity of incident case {}
predicate_mappings.component_affinity: the component affinity of incident case {} is related to infrastructure component {}
predicate_mappings.approver_affinity: the approver affinity of incident case {} is related to approver {}
predicate_mappings.external_dependency_affinity: the external dependency affinity of incident case {} is related to external dependency {}
predicate_mappings.rollback_affinity: the rollback affinity of incident case {} is related to rollback plan {}
predicate_mappings.change_item_affinity: the change item affinity of incident case {} is related to change item {}
predicate_mappings.stakeholder_group_affinity: the stakeholder group affinity of incident case {} is related to stakeholder group {}

predicate_mappings.variant_context_active: variant context is active for incident case {}

predicate_mappings.provisional_checks_flag: provisional checks flag is set for incident case {}
predicate_mappings.change_item_window_affinity: change item window affinity for incident case {} to {}

declare_incident.description: declare incident an incident case A
preconditions: I can only declare incident an incident case A if it is not the case that the incident A has been declared and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I declare incident an incident case A, it is the case that the incident A has been declared

assign_responder_to_incident.description: assign an oncall responder B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only assign an oncall responder B to an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and B is available and the responder assignment for incident case A is possible with on call responder B
I can only assign an oncall responder B to an incident case A if it is not the case that A has an assignment
effects: Once I assign an oncall responder B to an incident case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the incident A and A has an assignment
Once I assign an oncall responder B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

revoke_responder_assignment.description: revoke assignment of an oncall responder B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke assignment of an oncall responder B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the incident A
I can only revoke assignment of an oncall responder B from an incident case A if it is not the case that A is execution ready and it is not the case that A has obtained final approvals
effects: Once I revoke assignment of an oncall responder B from an incident case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I revoke assignment of an oncall responder B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the incident A and it is not the case anymore that A has an assignment and it is not the case anymore that A has resources locked and it is not the case anymore that A has a verified runbook and it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval and it is not the case anymore that a change has been executed for A and it is not the case anymore that provisional checks flag is set for incident case A

reserve_resource_token.description: reserve a reservation token B for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a reservation token B for an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and the reservation B is available
effects: Once I reserve a reservation token B for an incident case A, it is the case that reservation B is linked to incident case A
Once I reserve a reservation token B for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the reservation B is available

release_resource_token.description: release a reservation token B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only release a reservation token B from an incident case A if it is the case that reservation B is linked to incident case A
effects: Once I release a reservation token B from an incident case A, it is the case that the reservation B is available
Once I release a reservation token B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that reservation B is linked to incident case A

confirm_reservation_lock.description: confirm reservation lock for an incident case A with a reservation token B
preconditions: I can only confirm reservation lock for an incident case A with a reservation token B if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and A has an assignment and reservation B is linked to incident case A
I can only confirm reservation lock for an incident case A with a reservation token B if it is not the case that A has resources locked
effects: Once I confirm reservation lock for an incident case A with a reservation token B, it is the case that A has resources locked

apply_preliminary_approval.description: apply preliminary approval to an incident case A using an approval token B
preconditions: I can only apply preliminary approval to an incident case A using an approval token B if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and A has an assignment and the approval token B is available
I can only apply preliminary approval to an incident case A using an approval token B if it is not the case that A has resources locked
effects: Once I apply preliminary approval to an incident case A using an approval token B, it is the case that A has resources locked and A has provisional approval
Once I apply preliminary approval to an incident case A using an approval token B, it is not the case anymore that the approval token B is available

validate_runbook_with_reservation.description: validate a runbook C for an incident case A using a reservation token B
preconditions: I can only validate a runbook C for an incident case A using a reservation token B if it is the case that A has resources locked and A has an assignment and reservation B is linked to incident case A and the runbook C is available
I can only validate a runbook C for an incident case A using a reservation token B if it is not the case that A has a verified runbook
effects: Once I validate a runbook C for an incident case A using a reservation token B, it is the case that A has a verified runbook
Once I validate a runbook C for an incident case A using a reservation token B, it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval

validate_runbook_with_window.description: validate runbook for an incident case A within an execution window B
preconditions: I can only validate runbook for an incident case A within an execution window B if it is the case that A has an assignment and a window has been allocated for A in B
I can only validate runbook for an incident case A within an execution window B if it is not the case that A has a verified runbook
effects: Once I validate runbook for an incident case A within an execution window B, it is the case that A has a verified runbook
Once I validate runbook for an incident case A within an execution window B, it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval

request_component_approval.description: request approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A
preconditions: I can only request approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and B is available and the component affinity of incident case A is related to infrastructure component B
effects: Once I request approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A, it is the case that A targets the component B
Once I request approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

revoke_component_approval.description: revoke approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A if it is the case that A targets the component B
effects: Once I revoke approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I revoke approval for an infrastructure component B in an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A targets the component B

request_approver_engagement.description: request engagement of an approver B for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only request engagement of an approver B for an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and B is available and the approver affinity of incident case A is related to approver B
effects: Once I request engagement of an approver B for an incident case A, it is the case that B is engaged with A
Once I request engagement of an approver B for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

revoke_approver_engagement.description: revoke engagement of an approver B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke engagement of an approver B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is engaged with A
effects: Once I revoke engagement of an approver B from an incident case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I revoke engagement of an approver B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is engaged with A

request_external_dependency_engagement.description: request engagement of an external dependency B for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only request engagement of an external dependency B for an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and B is available and the external dependency affinity of incident case A is related to external dependency B
effects: Once I request engagement of an external dependency B for an incident case A, it is the case that B is engaged with A
Once I request engagement of an external dependency B for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

revoke_external_dependency_engagement.description: revoke engagement of an external dependency B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke engagement of an external dependency B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is engaged with A
effects: Once I revoke engagement of an external dependency B from an incident case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I revoke engagement of an external dependency B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is engaged with A

request_change_item_link.description: request link of a change item B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only request link of a change item B to an incident case A if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and the change item B is available and the change item affinity of incident case A is related to change item B
effects: Once I request link of a change item B to an incident case A, it is the case that B is linked to A
Once I request link of a change item B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the change item B is available

revoke_change_item_link.description: revoke link of a change item B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only revoke link of a change item B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is linked to A
effects: Once I revoke link of a change item B from an incident case A, it is the case that the change item B is available
Once I revoke link of a change item B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is linked to A

schedule_change_plan.description: schedule a change plan B for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component C with approval from an approver D
preconditions: I can only schedule a change plan B for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component C with approval from an approver D if it is the case that A has an assignment and A targets the component C and D is engaged with A and B is valid and the change plan B affects the affinity of incident case A
I can only schedule a change plan B for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component C with approval from an approver D if it is not the case that A is execution ready
effects: Once I schedule a change plan B for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component C with approval from an approver D, it is the case that B is a scheduled change for A and A is execution ready
Once I schedule a change plan B for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component C with approval from an approver D, it is not the case anymore that B is valid

schedule_change_with_dependency_and_roll.description: schedule a change plan B with an external dependency C and a rollback plan D for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only schedule a change plan B with an external dependency C and a rollback plan D for an incident case A if it is the case that A has an assignment and C is engaged with A and the rollback plan D is available and B is valid and the change plan B affects the affinity of incident case A and the rollback affinity of incident case A is related to rollback plan D
I can only schedule a change plan B with an external dependency C and a rollback plan D for an incident case A if it is not the case that A is execution ready
effects: Once I schedule a change plan B with an external dependency C and a rollback plan D for an incident case A, it is the case that B is a scheduled change for A and A is execution ready and provisional checks flag is set for incident case A and A has provisional approval

Once I schedule a change plan B with an external dependency C and a rollback plan D for an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is valid and it is not the case anymore that the rollback plan D is available

prepare_remediation_plan_validation.description: prepare remediation plan validation for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C
preconditions: I can only prepare remediation plan validation for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C if it is the case that A is execution ready and provisional checks flag is set for incident case A and A targets the component B and C is engaged with A
effects: Once I prepare remediation plan validation for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C, it is not the case anymore that provisional checks flag is set for incident case A and it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval

collect_final_approvals.description: collect final approvals for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C and a response team D
preconditions: I can only collect final approvals for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C and a response team D if it is the case that A has a verified runbook and A is execution ready and A targets the component B and C is engaged with A and the stakeholder group affinity of incident case A is related to stakeholder group D

I can only collect final approvals for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C and a response team D if it is not the case that A has provisional approval and it is not the case that A has obtained final approvals
effects: Once I collect final approvals for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with an approver C and a response team D, it is the case that A has obtained final approvals

collect_cross_team_approvals.description: collect cross team approvals for an incident case A involving an external dependency B, a change item C, and an escalation channel D
preconditions: I can only collect cross team approvals for an incident case A involving an external dependency B, a change item C, and an escalation channel D if it is the case that A has a verified runbook and A is execution ready and B is engaged with A and C is linked to A and the stakeholder group affinity of incident case A is related to stakeholder group D

I can only collect cross team approvals for an incident case A involving an external dependency B, a change item C, and an escalation channel D if it is not the case that A has obtained final approvals
effects: Once I collect cross team approvals for an incident case A involving an external dependency B, a change item C, and an escalation channel D, it is the case that A has obtained final approvals and A has provisional approval

authorize_execution.description: authorize execution for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with approval from an approver C
preconditions: I can only authorize execution for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with approval from an approver C if it is the case that A has obtained final approvals and A has provisional approval and A targets the component B and C is engaged with A
effects: Once I authorize execution for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with approval from an approver C, it is the case that a change has been executed for A

Once I authorize execution for an incident case A targeting an infrastructure component B with approval from an approver C, it is not the case anymore that A has provisional approval and it is not the case anymore that A has a verified runbook and it is not the case anymore that provisional checks flag is set for incident case A

perform_post_authorization_runbook_valid.description: perform post authorization runbook validation for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C
preconditions: I can only perform post authorization runbook validation for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C if it is the case that a change has been executed for A and A has obtained final approvals and A has an assignment and reservation B is linked to incident case A and the runbook C is available
I can only perform post authorization runbook validation for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C if it is not the case that A has a verified runbook
effects: Once I perform post authorization runbook validation for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C, it is the case that A has a verified runbook

mark_runbook_checkpoint.description: mark runbook checkpoint for an incident case A with a reservation token B
preconditions: I can only mark runbook checkpoint for an incident case A with a reservation token B if it is the case that A has obtained final approvals and A has a verified runbook and reservation B is linked to incident case A
I can only mark runbook checkpoint for an incident case A with a reservation token B if it is not the case that A has provisional approval and it is not the case that A has a confirmed reservation
effects: Once I mark runbook checkpoint for an incident case A with a reservation token B, it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation

consume_approval_token_for_checkpoint.description: consume approval token an approval token B for checkpoint of an incident case A
preconditions: I can only consume approval token an approval token B for checkpoint of an incident case A if it is the case that A has obtained final approvals and A has a verified runbook and the approval token B is available

I can only consume approval token an approval token B for checkpoint of an incident case A if it is not the case that A has provisional approval and it is not the case that A has a confirmed reservation
effects: Once I consume approval token an approval token B for checkpoint of an incident case A, it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation
Once I consume approval token an approval token B for checkpoint of an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the approval token B is available

reserve_execution_window_for_change_item.description: reserve execution window an execution window B for change item of an incident case A
preconditions: I can only reserve execution window an execution window B for change item of an incident case A if it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation and the window B is available and change item window affinity for incident case A to B
effects: Once I reserve execution window an execution window B for change item of an incident case A, it is the case that the case window for incident case A is reserved for execution window B
Once I reserve execution window an execution window B for change item of an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the window B is available

confirm_window_for_variant.description: confirm window an execution window C for variant of an incident variant context A with an incident variant case B
preconditions: I can only confirm window an execution window C for variant of an incident variant context A with an incident variant case B if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and variant context is active for incident case A and a variant window has been assigned to A in C and the case window for incident case B is reserved for execution window C
I can only confirm window an execution window C for variant of an incident variant context A with an incident variant case B if it is not the case that a window has been allocated for A in C
effects: Once I confirm window an execution window C for variant of an incident variant context A with an incident variant case B, it is the case that a window has been allocated for A in C

initiate_external_coordination.description: initiate external coordination for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C
preconditions: I can only initiate external coordination for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C if it is the case that the incident A has been declared and variant context is active for incident case A and A has a verified runbook and A has a confirmed reservation and reservation B is linked to incident case A and the runbook C is available
I can only initiate external coordination for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C if it is not the case that pre execution has been verified for A
effects: Once I initiate external coordination for an incident case A using a reservation token B and a runbook C, it is the case that pre execution has been verified for A

close_incident_after_validation.description: close an incident case A after validation
preconditions: I can only close an incident case A after validation if it is the case that initial triage is needed for incident case A and the incident A has been declared and A has an assignment and A is execution ready and A has obtained final approvals and A has a confirmed reservation and A has a verified runbook
I can only close an incident case A after validation if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an incident case A after validation, it is the case that A is closed

close_incident_with_window_validation.description: close an incident case A with window validation in an execution window B
preconditions: I can only close an incident case A with window validation in an execution window B if it is the case that variant context is active for incident case A and the incident A has been declared and A has an assignment and A is execution ready and A has obtained final approvals and A has a confirmed reservation and A has a verified runbook and a window has been allocated for A in B
I can only close an incident case A with window validation in an execution window B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an incident case A with window validation in an execution window B, it is the case that A is closed

close_incident_with_variant_validation.description: close an incident case A with variant validation
preconditions: I can only close an incident case A with variant validation if it is the case that variant context is active for incident case A and the incident A has been declared and A has an assignment and A is execution ready and A has obtained final approvals and A has a confirmed reservation and A has a verified runbook and pre execution has been verified for A
I can only close an incident case A with variant validation if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close an incident case A with variant validation, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_responder_to_incident: assign oncall responder {?oncall_responder} to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_responder_assignment: revoke assignment of oncall responder {?oncall_responder} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_resource_token: reserve reservation token {?reservation_token} for incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.release_resource_token: release reservation token {?reservation_token} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_reservation_lock: confirm reservation lock for incident case {?incident_case} with reservation token {?reservation_token}
action_nl_templates.apply_preliminary_approval: apply preliminary approval to incident case {?incident_case} using approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates.validate_runbook_with_reservation: validate runbook {?runbook} for incident case {?incident_case} using reservation token {?reservation_token}
action_nl_templates.validate_runbook_with_window: validate runbook for incident case {?incident_case} within execution window {?execution_window}
action_nl_templates.request_component_approval: request approval for infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} in incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_component_approval: revoke approval for infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} in incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.request_approver_engagement: request engagement of approver {?approver} for incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_approver_engagement: revoke engagement of approver {?approver} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.request_external_dependency_engagement: request engagement of external dependency {?external_dependency} for incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_external_dependency_engagement: revoke engagement of external dependency {?external_dependency} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.request_change_item_link: request link of change item {?change_item} to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_change_item_link: revoke link of change item {?change_item} from incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.schedule_change_plan: schedule change plan {?change_plan} for incident case {?incident_case} targeting infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with approval from approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.schedule_change_with_dependency_and_roll: schedule change plan {?change_plan} with external dependency {?external_dependency} and rollback plan {?rollback_plan} for incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.prepare_remediation_plan_validation: prepare remediation plan validation for incident case {?incident_case} targeting infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.collect_final_approvals: collect final approvals for incident case {?incident_case} targeting infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with approver {?approver} and response team {?response_team}
action_nl_templates.collect_cross_team_approvals: collect cross-team approvals for incident case {?incident_case} involving external dependency {?external_dependency}, change item {?change_item}, and escalation channel {?escalation_channel}
action_nl_templates.authorize_execution: authorize execution for incident case {?incident_case} targeting infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with approval from approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.perform_post_authorization_runbook_valid: perform post-authorization runbook validation for incident case {?incident_case} using reservation token {?reservation_token} and runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.mark_runbook_checkpoint: mark runbook checkpoint for incident case {?incident_case} with reservation token {?reservation_token}
action_nl_templates.consume_approval_token_for_checkpoint: consume approval token approval token {?approval_token} for checkpoint of incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_execution_window_for_change_item: reserve execution window execution window {?execution_window} for change item of incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_window_for_variant: confirm window execution window {?execution_window} for variant of incident variant context {?incident_variant_context} with incident variant case {?incident_variant_commander}
action_nl_templates.initiate_external_coordination: initiate external coordination for incident case {?incident_case} using reservation token {?reservation_token} and runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.close_incident_with_window_validation: close incident case {?incident_case} with window validation in execution window {?execution_window}
action_nl_templates.close_incident_with_variant_validation: close incident case {?incident_case} with variant validation

predicate_nl_templates.change_executed: a change has been executed for {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.variant_window_assigned: a variant window has been assigned to {?incident_case} in {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.window_allocated_for_case: a window has been allocated for {?incident_case} in {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.responder_assignment_possible: the responder assignment for incident case {?incident_case} is possible with on-call responder {?oncall_responder}
predicate_nl_templates.change_plan_affinity: the change plan {?change_plan} affects the affinity of incident case {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.component_affinity: the component affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}
predicate_nl_templates.approver_affinity: the approver affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to approver {?approver}
predicate_nl_templates.external_dependency_affinity: the external dependency affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to external dependency {?external_dependency}
predicate_nl_templates.rollback_affinity: the rollback affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to rollback plan {?rollback_plan}
predicate_nl_templates.change_item_affinity: the change item affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to change item {?change_item}
predicate_nl_templates.stakeholder_group_affinity: the stakeholder group affinity of incident case {?incident_case} is related to stakeholder group {?stakeholder_group}
predicate_nl_templates.case_window_reserved: the case window for incident case {?incident_case} is reserved for execution window {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.initial_triage_needed: initial triage is needed for incident case {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.variant_context_active: variant context is active for incident case {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.reservation_linked: reservation {?reservation_token} is linked to incident case {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.provisional_checks_flag: provisional checks flag is set for incident case {?incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.change_item_window_affinity: change item window affinity for incident case {?incident_case} to {?execution_window}

action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_responder_assignment: revoke assignment of an oncall responder {?oncall_responder} from an incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_resource_token: release a reservation token {?reservation_token} from an incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_approver_engagement: revoke engagement of an approver {?approver} from an incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_external_dependency_engagement: revoke engagement of an external dependency {?external_dependency} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_change_item_link: request link of a change item {?change_item} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_change_item_link: revoke link of a change item {?change_item} from an incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_remediation_plan_validation: prepare remediation plan validation for an incident case {?incident_case} targeting an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_final_approvals: collect final approvals for an incident case {?incident_case} targeting an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with an approver {?approver} and a response team {?response_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_cross_team_approvals: collect cross-team approvals for an incident case {?incident_case} involving an external dependency {?external_dependency}, a change item {?change_item}, and an escalation channel {?escalation_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_execution: authorize execution for an incident case {?incident_case} targeting an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} with approval from an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_post_authorization_runbook_valid: perform post-authorization runbook validation for an incident case {?incident_case} using a reservation token {?reservation_token} and a runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_runbook_checkpoint: mark runbook checkpoint for an incident case {?incident_case} with a reservation token {?reservation_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_approval_token_for_checkpoint: consume approval token an approval token {?approval_token} for checkpoint of an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_execution_window_for_change_item: reserve execution window an execution window {?execution_window} for change item of an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_window_for_variant: confirm window an execution window {?execution_window} for variant of an incident variant context {?incident_variant_context} with an incident variant case {?incident_variant_commander}

action_nl_templates_indef.close_incident_with_variant_validation: close an incident case {?incident_case} with variant validation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a incident case or a oncall responder or a change plan or a approver or a infrastructure component or a external dependency or a reservation token or a approval token or a execution window or a runbook or a rollback plan or a change item or a stakeholder group is also a entity
Everything that is a response team or a escalation channel is also a stakeholder group
Everything that is a incident variant case or a incident variant context is also a incident case
